basics.name: Dhiraj Patil
basics.title: Salesforce Administrator | Salesforce Developer | Field Service Lightning (FSL) | Flow Automation | Apex & LWC
basics.summary: I am a Salesforce Administrator with 2 years of hands-on experience in Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, and Salesforce Field Service (FSL). I have worked on real-time business implementations across Sales Cloud, Service, Field Service Lightning (FSL) and non-profit domains. I specialize in configuring Work Orders, Service Appointments, automation using Flows, managing Salesforce Security (Profiles, Permission Sets, Sharing Rules), and supporting field operations through FSL. I have contributed to projects for organizations like Shakti Pumps, Merino Industries, and Reliance Life Sciences, Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (SPCA). Along with administration, I also have working knowledge of Apex and Lightning Web Components (LWC), allowing me to collaborate effectively with development teams and implement scalable solutions. I am passionate about optimizing business processes, improving field service efficiency, and delivering secure, automated Salesforce solutions.

bullets: Configured and maintained Sales Cloud and Service Cloud applications based on business requirements.
Implemented and administered Salesforce Field Service (FSL), including Work Orders, Service Appointments, Service Territories, Scheduling Policies, and Service Resources.
Designed and developed Record-Triggered Flows to automate business processes and reduce manual effort.
Managed Salesforce Security model including Profiles, Permission Sets, Role Hierarchy, Sharing Rules, and Manual Sharing.
Created and maintained Validation Rules and Approval Processes to ensure data accuracy and compliance.
Provided production support by troubleshooting issues and ensuring system stability.
Collaborated with developers on Apex classes, triggers, and Lightning Web Components (LWC) enhancements.
Built Reports and Dashboards to improve visibility of sales and service operations.
